title: Thol Heat Wave
lead: Thol is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.80. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, posing health risks to residents.
body:
The current heat wave in Thol has resulted in a score of 10.0/10, indicating severe conditions. 
 The temperature has led to a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 15.8 GG, significantly higher than usual. 
 With humidity at 37% and wind speed at 11.0 km/h, the heat index is further exacerbated, causing discomfort to the population.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
